markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content strategy and resolve critical data tracking issues.](https://fathom.video/share/eFbWNyDxvywzPkojkBiMKieAkZhSxbFd?tab=summary&timestamp=151.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Critical Data Discrepancy:** GA4 sessions now exceed GSC clicks (e.g., 21k clicks → \~11k sessions in Nov), reversing the normal funnel and indicating a major tracking error.](https://fathom.video/share/eFbWNyDxvywzPkojkBiMKieAkZhSxbFd?tab=summary&timestamp=1058.0)
  - [**GA4 Data Contamination:** Custom GTM scripts are polluting GA4 data with non-standard mediums like `article` (55k sessions) and `blog` (11k sessions), obscuring true organic performance.](https://fathom.video/share/eFbWNyDxvywzPkojkBiMKieAkZhSxbFd?tab=summary&timestamp=1210.0)
  - [**Content Strategy Blocked:** The new LLM-driven strategy is blocked pending async review by Hadassah (due EOW), which is required to finalize the content calendar and assign 60–80 new/refresh topics.](https://fathom.video/share/eFbWNyDxvywzPkojkBiMKieAkZhSxbFd?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
  - [**Action Plan:** GrowthX will audit Outreach's GTM scripts and GA4 configuration to diagnose and fix the data issues.](https://fathom.video/share/eFbWNyDxvywzPkojkBiMKieAkZhSxbFd?tab=summary&timestamp=1389.0)

## Topics

### Data Tracking Issues

  - [**Problem 1: GA4 vs. GSC Discrepancy**](https://fathom.video/share/eFbWNyDxvywzPkojkBiMKieAkZhSxbFd?tab=summary&timestamp=1058.0)
      - [**Finding:** GA4 sessions now exceed GSC clicks, reversing the expected funnel.](https://fathom.video/share/eFbWNyDxvywzPkojkBiMKieAkZhSxbFd?tab=summary&timestamp=1058.0)
      - [**Significance:** This indicates a fundamental tracking error, as clicks should always be ≥ sessions.](https://fathom.video/share/eFbWNyDxvywzPkojkBiMKieAkZhSxbFd?tab=summary&timestamp=1097.0)
      - [**Example (Nov):** 21k GSC clicks → \~11k GA4 sessions.](https://fathom.video/share/eFbWNyDxvywzPkojkBiMKieAkZhSxbFd?tab=summary&timestamp=1159.0)
  - [**Problem 2: GA4 Data Contamination**](https://fathom.video/share/eFbWNyDxvywzPkojkBiMKieAkZhSxbFd?tab=summary&timestamp=1210.0)
      - [**Finding:** GA4 data is polluted with non-standard mediums, obscuring true organic performance.](https://fathom.video/share/eFbWNyDxvywzPkojkBiMKieAkZhSxbFd?tab=summary&timestamp=1210.0)
      - [**Example Mediums & Sessions:**](https://fathom.video/share/eFbWNyDxvywzPkojkBiMKieAkZhSxbFd?tab=summary&timestamp=1210.0)
          - [`article`: 55k](https://fathom.video/share/eFbWNyDxvywzPkojkBiMKieAkZhSxbFd?tab=summary&timestamp=1289.0)
          - [`blog`: 11k](https://fathom.video/share/eFbWNyDxvywzPkojkBiMKieAkZhSxbFd?tab=summary&timestamp=1268.0)
          - `organic`: \<10k
      - [**Cause:** A GTM script sets UTMs as cookies, which are then reapplied on return visits.](https://fathom.video/share/eFbWNyDxvywzPkojkBiMKieAkZhSxbFd?tab=summary&timestamp=1403.0)
      - [**Hypothesis:** The site's Single Page Application (SPA) architecture may be interfering with standard tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/eFbWNyDxvywzPkojkBiMKieAkZhSxbFd?tab=summary&timestamp=1632.0)

### Content Strategy & Execution

  - [**New Strategy Status:**](https://fathom.video/share/eFbWNyDxvywzPkojkBiMKieAkZhSxbFd?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)
      - [370 prompts are ready in Sprint, tagged to new topic clusters.](https://fathom.video/share/eFbWNyDxvywzPkojkBiMKieAkZhSxbFd?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)
      - [**Blocker:** Execution is paused pending async review by Hadassah (due EOW).](https://fathom.video/share/eFbWNyDxvywzPkojkBiMKieAkZhSxbFd?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
      - [**Goal:** Secure buy-in to finalize the content calendar and assign 60–80 topics.](https://fathom.video/share/eFbWNyDxvywzPkojkBiMKieAkZhSxbFd?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
  - [**Persona-Led Content:**](https://fathom.video/share/eFbWNyDxvywzPkojkBiMKieAkZhSxbFd?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)
      - [**Goal:** Shift from generic topics to persona-specific content (e.g., CROs, CFOs).](https://fathom.video/share/eFbWNyDxvywzPkojkBiMKieAkZhSxbFd?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)
      - [**Rationale:** To address specific, day-to-day goals (e.g., pipeline velocity) instead of general concepts (e.g., budget alignment).](https://fathom.video/share/eFbWNyDxvywzPkojkBiMKieAkZhSxbFd?tab=summary&timestamp=560.0)
      - [**Action:** Hadassah to provide benchmark examples (good/bad) to update writing guidelines.](https://fathom.video/share/eFbWNyDxvywzPkojkBiMKieAkZhSxbFd?tab=summary&timestamp=606.0)
  - [**Listicle Refresh:**](https://fathom.video/share/eFbWNyDxvywzPkojkBiMKieAkZhSxbFd?tab=summary&timestamp=159.0)
      - **Goal:** Refresh the "11 tools..." listicle to improve its \#6 rank.
      - [**Plan:** Add more tools and categories.](https://fathom.video/share/eFbWNyDxvywzPkojkBiMKieAkZhSxbFd?tab=summary&timestamp=184.0)
      - [**Decision:** Include competitor Gong if a strong value-based use case can be made to overcome internal resistance.](https://fathom.video/share/eFbWNyDxvywzPkojkBiMKieAkZhSxbFd?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Hadassah:**](https://fathom.video/share/eFbWNyDxvywzPkojkBiMKieAkZhSxbFd?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
      - [Complete async review of the new content strategy (due EOW).](https://fathom.video/share/eFbWNyDxvywzPkojkBiMKieAkZhSxbFd?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
      - [Share benchmark content examples to update writing guidelines.](https://fathom.video/share/eFbWNyDxvywzPkojkBiMKieAkZhSxbFd?tab=summary&timestamp=606.0)
      - [Provide PMM feedback on the "11 tools..." listicle brief.](https://fathom.video/share/eFbWNyDxvywzPkojkBiMKieAkZhSxbFd?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - [**Andrew:**](https://fathom.video/share/eFbWNyDxvywzPkojkBiMKieAkZhSxbFd?tab=summary&timestamp=1389.0)
      - [Grant GTM access to GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/eFbWNyDxvywzPkojkBiMKieAkZhSxbFd?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
      - [Share Google's recommended GA4 channel definitions.](https://fathom.video/share/eFbWNyDxvywzPkojkBiMKieAkZhSxbFd?tab=summary&timestamp=1722.0)
  - [**Jo:**](https://fathom.video/share/eFbWNyDxvywzPkojkBiMKieAkZhSxbFd?tab=summary&timestamp=1474.0)
      - [Identify a technical contact at GrowthX to audit GTM scripts and GA4 setup.](https://fathom.video/share/eFbWNyDxvywzPkojkBiMKieAkZhSxbFd?tab=summary&timestamp=1474.0)
      - [Follow up with Andrew by EOW after the internal review.](https://fathom.video/share/eFbWNyDxvywzPkojkBiMKieAkZhSxbFd?tab=summary&timestamp=1757.0)
